title: hieracium subsilvaticum
intro: Hieracium subsilvaticum, also known as Woodland Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as having antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Hieracium subsilvaticum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
